creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tomoaki AOKI from comment #17)

> The only possible consumer of x11/linux-nvidia-libs* in the ports tree seems to be net-im/zoom

Any Linux OpenGL/Vulkan app is a "possible consumer". For Nvidia video card owners, that is. Not to mention that my little CUDA/NVENC/OpenCL hack depends on Linux libs. (In any case, I always test that thing well in advance of port updates.)
